mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wiki_reports (category, reporter_name, reporter_email, message, source_url, item_name) VALUES (#{category}, #{reporterName}, #{reporterEmail}, #{message}, #{sourceUrl}, #{itemName})
mapper.select: SELECT id, category, reporter_name as reporterName, reporter_email as reporterEmail, message, source_url as sourceUrl, item_name as itemName, created_at as createdAt FROM wiki_reports ORDER BY created_at DESC
